reviews_data.review_text: This place  is so cute! The staff was so sweet and helpful for a first time history. I order a strawberry banana smoothie and it was delicious. The pricing is great for a low budget date! And of course the cats were adorbal, friendly, and playful!
Delicious coffee, friendly service, and sweet kitties. We are from out of town and were so happy to find this spot. The gift shop also has very cute stuff. If only we could have adopted all the cats!

The sweet lady at the front (who had gorgeous locs btw) was so sweet and ananswered any questions we had about the cats! Best chai I’ve ever had , it was so yummy!! The cats are obviously, well, taken care of, the rooms are so bright, vibrant, and fun, just overall, everything was amazing!

Great service! Love all the cats everytime I go here and happy they finally got ways to tell which cats are more feisty than others. Great place to decompress and chill and play with our feline friends! Not to mention coffee is great, love the frappe!
I traveled from Colorado to Gastonia and had a fantastic visit. The cafe was clean, staff was kind, and the coffee was great! Also love how much the owners give back to the community.
Absolutely LOVE LOVE LOVE this place!!!!!

Cute new location in the heart of Gastonia, a nice place to hang out and enjoy coffee and pastries, and maybe even adopt a kitty-all of the cats are up for adoption. The owner gives back to the community with blessing bags and other free items
for the unhoused, as well as cat food for anyone who needs it.
This place has the absolute best coffee!! It’s also locally roasted. I love their mission too. The staff is always friendly and kind! Highly recommended!

This cat cafe was burdened by the fact that it was very unclean. The cats were pleasant, so so sweet and I admire the mission of the store, but it was a mess inside. Litter and food all over the floor, hair caked up on seats and also their sleeping areas, throw up on the floor and windows, trash (seemingly from customers) not picked up and on the floor with the cats. Overall, just not the environment the cats deserve. Food and service was nice, but it should be upkept better for the cat's sakes.
This was an awesome place to take my granddaughters. We had a blast. Very kid friendly.
Really just so cute! I love the cats the coffee and the staff

Paid for 30 minutes (3people) left after 10 minutes. I was petting one of the cats and it scratched me and drew blood. I told the lady at the front and all she was it’s been a busy day for them with lots of small children. If your cats are overstimulated maybe you should tell people before they pay.
The Cinnamon Cappuccino wasn't good at all the host was nice though .
Great place to play with some cats and sip coffee.  The peanut butter cup frappe was fantastic.
It was so good and the cats were so nice! The food was amazing! And Jane doe is so cute!!
It was wonderful to sit and pet the cats. The atmosphere is so good and all the cats are up for adoption. They also have events that they go to so please visit them.

reviews_data.owner_answer: The fee for the cat area goes to the cats and their medical/upkeep expenses. We work with rescues and our cats are adoptable, but we are still responsible for their care while they are here and that gets expensive. Especially with up to 9 cats at a time. All cat cafes charge for the cat area and we are the cheapest in the state.
reviews_data.review_text: Coffe and pastries are delicious, price is good! But having to pay to see and pet the cats defeats the purpose of coming here!
Super cute! Super friendly! The decor is so cute! Definitely recommend visiting! Little shop has cute items to buy too!
such a beautiful cozy place. all the cats were so healthy, soft, and well taken care of ❤️ thank you for hosting a cat mediation!
The people who work here are so kind and friendly! They support a lot of small artists and businesses too, I look forward to visiting again!

Absolutely incredible place, I love the vibes here and the cats are soooooo cute.

Best prices I've seen in a while for coffee and for pastries. Absolutely enormous cookies for $3

Cannot recommend coming here enough, absolutely cool

We enjoy stopping by Cool Beans! Their new location is great!
They offer a good coffee menu, and tasty muffins/cookies/brownies to snack on while you play and snuggle with the kitties!

The staff is always friendly, and there is plenty of parking. They do limit the amount of people allowed in the kitty area at a time, which is great for the guests and the cats.

A great place to get some coffee and chill. The cats rotate out as they're adopted (a third party shelter works with the owner of the shop). The cats that were there on my last visit with my wife were very affectionate bar one that didn't want anything to do with anyone. Would highly recommend as long as you're willing to respect that the cats boundaries.
Great coffee, great service, and always the cutest kitties!
Bunch of kitties to play with. My daughter loves this place

reviews_data.owner_answer:
When were you here so we can look at the cameras? 
And what “coffee machine”)
reviews_data.review_text: Don’t drink the coffee! Not sure about everything else but the coffee machine is atrociously dirty
Great lil place to hang with some cute kitty kats.

I’ve been three times & I love it here! Everything is reasonably priced & getting to pet the cats is so therapeutic for me. They’re so friendly and sweet! I love the business and everything it stands for, you can always catch me coming back to chill with the kitties & sip on an iced latte. :)

10/10! The cats were adorable, Jonas was particularly friendly. My partner had a hot tea (they have several sugar/sweetener options to choose from) and I got the iced caramel macchiato- it was absolutely delicious! I included a picture of my drink and some of the cats

reviews_data.owner_answer: Our location has been updated since March. On google and social media.
reviews_data.review_text: Drove 30 mins just for their location not to be updated. :(
It was a great place to chill and have coffee we played with the kitties my 15 yr old loved the surprise.  As she didn't know I was taking her there .
Precious
Support local businesses.

So wonderful playing
with the sweet and crazy kitties 😸 💕

reviews_data.owner_answer: We were open all day today and our doors were never locked. Also, we got no phone calls. We are located at 176 S Chester st. Are you sure you went to the right place?
reviews_data.review_text: We drove all the way out here to see the cats but the front door was locked. Their hours says they were open (we got there at about 1:15 pm), and had just posted on their Facebook that they were open until 4pm today 25 minutes prior to us arriving. Additionally, they did not answer their phones.

reviews_data.review_text: The lady was super nice. The cats was really sweet and wanted a lot of love. They up for adoption also wish I could get them all but I got a lot now that I taken in over the years but it was nice to visit and give them attention and some love they had a lot of play area for them. Prices was fair large cappuccino was only like 4 dollars and they had a few merchandise you could purchase very nice cosy atmosphere
Such a wonderful and cozy cafe! Its got the best atmosphere ever, and staff that makes you feel welcomed everytime
Cute cats all available for adoption.
My first time here and loved it. Best coffee shop in Gastonia! Love they adopt out the adorable kitties.

I went here this afternoon and had such wonderful experience. The girl who helped me was very kind and welcoming, going over the rules of the cafe

The cats were so adorable especially Mason, the space was neat; plenty of places for the cats to rest and play.

Definitely check this place out, great customer service, cute cats and relaxing atmosphere. I’m definitely coming back here ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews_data.owner_answer: What a nice review! We’re glad that you enjoyed your visit 🥰
reviews_data.review_text:
This place is so adorable and amazing you can tell they really care about the cats and there’s some rooms that’s off limits(i believe just for the cats/employees) and it’s an amazing idea to let the cats be able to take time away if it’s crowded!!

The rules are very simple and easy to follow for their safety and all of the cats are sweet they either rubbed against my hand or gave me a kiss, some are silly about trying to get the straw to your drink. (we didn’t pick up the black kitty i think his name is Sags he hopped onto my BF to try to get his straw but we respected every rule for their safety)
I also love how you can adopt them as well, MASON MY BELOVED ILL MISS YOU FOREVER i wish i could have gotten him i love his little curly belly and his cuddliness!!

We got a hazelnut frappe and a lavender frappe and it was so yummy! The girl who helped serve us was also so sweet and informative on all their names and personalities this place is an 11/10 we’ll definitely be back soon hopefully to adopt! Thank you so much :D
Adorable cat cafe in downtown Gastonia. Decent coffee, a few books for sale up front. Staff was very knowledgeable of the cats and their demeanors. All cats are available for adoption for a fee.

Amazing little cat cafe in the heart of downtown Gastonia. They have an assortment of coffee, tea, bakery items, and snacks for you to enjoy while indulging in the absolute cuteness of adoptable cats.
A wonderful place to visit! Excellent customer service, a tasty mocha frappe and the kitties are purrrfect. 😸
Really good coffee concoctions and they do a great job getting the kissykats adopted!
Great drinks and calming atmosphere.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi, Chantel! 
All cat cafes charge a fee, it’s to pay for the up keep of our rescue cats! We are actually the cheapest cat cafe in the state. We were at max capacity in the lounge, which I expressed to you multiple times, and we definitely don’t allow younger people in the back without an adult present and you didn’t want to accompany your young people. If you don’t want to pay the fee that’s fine with us, but you can’t visit the cats without paying the fee. 
Your coffees may have tasted different because they were different. I asked multiple times if you wanted house brew coffee or a latte. Your son got house brew and you got a latte. Your son got caramel and vanilla in his drink, 2 flavors are sweeter than one, especially since you asked for light syrup instead of the normal amount in your latte. We apologize that you were let down, but we tried our best to help you understand our rules and how the coffee is made. Have a good day!
reviews_data.review_text:
Well, I was excited to go here and see the cats really quickly and grab a nice cold brew to go after a long day at a vendor market.

We got there, and the cat "room" is seperate from the rest of the cafe, and you have to pay $7 per person to go in (and there was an almost 30 minute wait to to in there).

I went to order drinks, and asked questions about the sweetener used in the drinks. The answer was that they're all different. I told the person I was looking for cane sugar based and they're all different again was the response.

So, I ordered two iced coffees with oat milk and they were both drastically different. Neither tasted right
The maple one tasted like artifical chemicals and my son's caramel one was about 5 times as swwleet as mine and tasted like straight sugar.

The whole experience was just odd and I didn't feel like the customer service was there at all. It was quite a let-down, actually.
We’ve been here a couple times and it’s always fun! We love the quarter machine with the cat toys and accessories. Drinks are good but not the best I’ve ever had.
This place is amazing... the cutest lil kitties, all waiting fur ever homes, I wish I could take them all home, but I will go back to play with them again real soon
Nice place to relax, and enjoy a macchiato!

The only issue I had was my husband and I went in and paid for an hour to visit with the cats. We went as soon as the cafe opened, so we were the only people there, which was great.  15 minutes after that, 3  other people came in . One of the people had a laser pointer to play with the cats.  Naturally, all 8 cats left the room were in and spent the rest of the time with them
We left and lost 30 minutes.

One of the best cafes I've been to. It's a calm, quiet, and pleasant atmosphere with some amazing coffee and a friendly server. The cats are very friendly and curious—but be careful if you get a cookie! They will try to eat it for you! Overall, a wonderful place I'd love to visit again.
Great cat cafe! The cats are always playful here. The coffee and drinks are really good too
An amazing quaint, cozy little place to enjoy kittys while enjoying the company of friends and coffee! Definitely recommend! 10/10
Mew mew sip sip

Amazing staff and coffee. The cats are clearly very loved and very well taken care of! Love that they have rules in place for the safety and wellbeing of the cats. Shows how much they take caring for the cats seriously. Was very cheap compared to other cat cafes. Me and my friend can't wait to return next Thursday! Highlight of my week.
Didn't have food but played with cats.

Just found this place today and I’m in love! Friendly service, the coffee is pretty tasty as well and all the cats are so cute! I expected some to not be as friendly but they were all very nice and cuddly. There was a couple that would follow you and sit in your lap, I forgot his name but the one addicted to whip cream was by far the best.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So glad you enjoyed it!
reviews_data.review_text: Sweet kitties that crawl in your lap and purr, friendly staff. Definitely would come back.

We stopped by Cool Beans to spend some time with the kitties. They are all rescues and available for adoption. I had a Carmel macchiato that was pretty good. The cats were a bit timid, but happy to play with you. There are lots of toys around for you to engage with the cats. A few were cuddlier than others.

Cool Beans has a very relaxed energy and the decor is quaint and cute. It is clear the kitties are all well taken care of. I would totally recommend this cafe to all cat lovers!

Summary: superb coffee, fun atmosphere, great place to chill yourself or with some friends or family!

I got a plain latte, as I usually do and it was exceptionally tasty- bold and smooth.

I stumbled on this place on the way home from a family outing and thought I’d treat everyone to a fun experience- and fun it was!

You pay a fee to get in the 3 rooms where the cats are and you must chill and pet them as they come up to you. There’s little toys if you want to try to entice them to play.

I highly recommend going here, even if you only like coffee- there’s plenty of seating away from the cats, with a book area and a table.

My family knows I’m not normally a cat fan, but I had a good time!
All in all it was a great experience and we’ll certainly be back soon- me mainly for the coffee, my family mainly for the cats.
Perfect cafe
Live the atmosphere and the cute cats ans kittens there! My favorite beverage is the caramel Frappuccino. I highly recommend you try this place!

I have gotten coffee here twice and spent an hour each time in the cat rooms. It is divided into 3 sections that are fairly private, so if there are several groups you can spread out. The staff was friendly and the cats have always been fun, even the shy one that hid under the chair and kept trying to drag toys under with her.
It is set up in an awkward way. The cays are adorable but the coffee was awful.
Cozy and comfortable space with tasty coffee and friendly service! And there's adorable, adoptable kitties to boot!! Loved it; will definitely be back soon!
Was sad that I had to pay to see the cats.

Были здесь проездом, заехали сюда взять кофе. Сам кофе, если быть честным - не очень, слишком слабый) Кофе как такового и не слышно. Место прикольное, идея классная 👍🏽 Там были котики 🐈 Так что пусть кофе и не вкусный, но зато деньги с него наверняка пойдут на пушистых)
Зашла бы еще, чисто ради котов)

Видела тут плохие отзывы, из-за цен на посещение комнаты с котиками. Я думаю 7$ вполне приемлемая цена. С учетом того что все это содержать не дешево. Да и ребят, вы оставляете в ресторанах чай не меньше, а тут помощь животным, и хорошие эмоции для вас) Так что не жлобьтесь)) Не уверена что это слово переведется на английский😅 это что то вроде - «не жадничайте» 😄🙌🏽
I love the decor and the ambience--has free wifi too! It is very chill and laid back.
Great place and awesome idea.
Great customer service and super sweet cats!!
Hands down the best car cafe ever! Cool Beans in the place to be at anytime! Great vibes and better cats!
Cute little fur babies, well kept space, easy instructions, friendly staff.
Thank you for making my Granddaughters Birthday special💜💕🎉🎂

If you are here for books and coffee, it's absolutely fantastic! A nice quiet place to chill. If you are here for the cats, you came to the purrfect place! There are 3 rooms of cat snuggling/playing fun available. Yes, it smells like 8 cats live here. That's expected. You get used to it. It's fine. The cats here are so sweet, well taken care of, and just want to see what's up, with few exceptions. The ladies manning the front are always so sweet and patient while we dig through the amazing selection of cat stickers and have delicious drink recommendations for every taste. We have cats at home, and it is still one of our favorite places to go! Definitely recommend!
Love this plc.🐾🐱
I go to Gamerz and repair my Chromebook

Great coffee, affordable used books, and cats to pet and play with. I couldn’t ask for much more in an establishment. This was my first visit, but I have a feeling I’ll be spending a lot of time getting caffeinated and petting cats here 😁
You've got to check this place out. They do such a wonderful thing for our local cats. The drinks are good and cuddling kitties is great. Check it out
Great relaxing place
Excellent coffee and a great experience. Saddest part was having to leave all the beautiful cats. Highly recommend visiting.
I took my children to cool beans tonight and we all had a wonderful time. Will return. The woman running the place was very nice and the drinks were great. Such a nice place!
Cats!
I absolutely love coming here periodically!! All of the cats are so amazing and the coffee flavors are so great!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, we apologize if you weren’t happy with your drinks, and we would’ve been happy to fix that for you! As far as our pricing goes, we are actually the least expensive cat café in the region. We understand that sometimes people don’t know why there’s a charge, but the money does go towards the care of the cats. We do hope that you’ll try us again in the future! Have a happy holiday!
reviews_data.review_text: Went to grab a quick coffee and for our son to play with cats for a few minutes but were informed that it was $7/person and $2 kids for 30 minutes with the cats. I personally feel that it is too much to have a coffee with cats around. Then we got our coffee and I think the barista forgot to put the coffee in either of our drinks. We had a latte and an Americano with an extra espresso shot and still couldn’t taste any coffee flavor. There was a good bit of other customers in there and the barista was by herself so we just left.
This is the perfect spot for a GREAT cup of coffee. The kitties are an EXTRA 😊
Cats are super friendly especially babs. Baby sat in my lap for a good 10 minutes and would have stayed longer if I had more time lol
Coffee was great and cats were adorable and so friendly and well loved.  My kids loved the muffins and playing with the cats.
Great coffee, lots of flavor options, alternative milks and the cutest kitties evar! ❤️
Been there twice now. Good frappés and sweet cats.
A very nice place to get a reasonable cup of coffee

What a wonderful place! I went there for the first time yesterday, and it was absolutely amazing!
The coffee was delicious, and the cats were adorable. One even came up to me and sat on me! Friendly staff, friendly cats, good coffee, this place has everything good in the world!
Nice & quiet place
Kitties for adoption for you to live on for only $7 a half hour or $10 an hour❤️❤️❤️
Coffee was great and all the kittens were so friendly and playful.  Would highly recommend going if you're looking for a new feline friend or if you just want to get your kitten fix.

We came across this place and are so happy we chose this cat cafe instead of one in Charlotte. They are much cheaper and you have a more intimate place to play with the kitties. The cats were very fun and friendly, I didn’t want to leave! Julie was also awesome to talk to and was very helpful. Next time we are in town I’d love come back and hopefully adopt a kitty ❤️❤️

The staff was super friendly. The latte was really good. The cats were nice with some being playful and some wanting to set in your lap to be scratched. The cat area had the rooms with a variety of seating options. You could choose from plenty of toys to play with the kitties.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello, I am the owner. I wasn’t there, but as I said in the last comment, my employee put me on FaceTime and I could hear running and screaming. Don’t know what you heard, as there are no businesses next door. Funny. Anyway, Sherlock sneezes and his nose gets irritated. The air is dry. Don’t know if you guys noticed, but that’s why we had a humidifier going. I apologize that you overheard her criticizing you, but you were being disruptive and she was frustrated after coming back there several times. I do appreciate your concern and I will certainly check on them first thing tomorrow to make sure they’re all fine. They were when I was there earlier today.
reviews_data.review_text: I was apart of a group that the owner was talking  badly about behind our backs. The owner spoke about us behind our backs saying we were loud and running, when all we were doing was talking and walking normally, but the floor and walls were thin. And it wasn't distressing or bothering the cats or other costumers. And the walls were so thin that we could hear the businesses next door. And the cats were clearly unwell. Their mucus was discolored and bloody. I feel it would have been better to let the cats rest and get better before letting them go back to the cafe and be around people. The coffee was great, but the service, was not so.
They don’t tell you that you have to pay to see some cats instead of taking donations

The lady was very unprofessional and was a little rude when we’re ordering the coffee did not inform us that we were paying to see the cats which you pay 7 dollars for 30 mins and we did not want to even really see them but hopefully the money will help the cats  she did not explain her self when she asked how old my niece was and then said if she was loud because she was one and was excited that she would hate to ask us to leave so all in all would not recommended
Very cool coffe shop where it is possible to play with real cats! If you love cats it is the perfect place for having a coffee. Additional fees for the access to the rooms with the cats.

What a wonderful cafe!!
The kitties are precious!!
Taking my granddaughter for her birthday. She hasn't idea where we are going!!
Gonna let her adopt one of her choice. It'll be #4 for us!!
The catpurrrchino is amazing and wonderfully priced!!!
Such cute loveable and friendly cats
Excellent coffee and they have adoptable cats you can play with. It's a win win!
Love this place!
Wonderful staff, great little bites and who could resist cats?!! 100% recommend
Great experience! Delicious beverages and friendly people.
Such cuties!
Such good vibes I love this place!
Amazing little shop to pet some sweet 🐈‍⬛ and sip some ☕️!! ♥️
The cats were so sweet and cute! The menu is also amazing, the coffee there is my favorite. Definitely recommend 💖
Such an awesome experience! 10/10 would recommend! 😻
Beautiful place, so much care taken for the kitties and the customers. Highly recommend!
Omg such a cute place!  This was my first visit to a cat cafe and I could not have enjoyed it more.  Yum the frappe was delish too :)

We took my cousin here for her going away outing. Super cute place. We loved the decor. Lattes were delicious!!! We Absolutely LOVED the kitties!!!! They were all so precious. Absolute 10/10 would recommend checking this place out. & we look forward to going back in the near future!
I want to live here honestly
The owner is absolutely lovely and has a real passion for the kitties
Great employees and sweet kitties 🥰

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Brooklynn!
reviews_data.review_text: Visited Cool Beans Today with my husband and his Cousin and we had the best time! I had the Chai Latte and it was to die for! Julianna was the best as she ALWAYS is! And I absolutely fell in love with Olive and Opal they were such a joy to play with! I can't wait to go back and play with them some more!
Such fun! Great cats, lovely atmosphere, tasty drinks. Loved every minute of it.
Such a lovely and cozy place! Amazing coffee and beautiful kitties. Went to visit NC and had to stop by wish they had these were I live.
Delightful cafe, and they love their kitties. Which you know means they’re good people.

While visiting some friends in Gastonia, they made sure to bring me to cool beans cat café… I loved it! I wish we had something like this at home. Besides getting to have coffee and desserts with some of the coolest cats in the world, I couldn’t have asked for better customer service and nicer people to meet.

Can’t wait to come back 💚
Great staff!
The owner does a fantastic job with all the kitties
Do YOU want some fur beans with your coffee beans!!! This is the place, wonderful, nominal fee to hang with the felines? So worthy, Caffeine and Kitties, great way to brighten your day. 😻

cats and coffee? sign me up! i’ve been to a few cat cafés and the set-up here with the cats is typical of how it works. the cats are rescues, so the fee helps with the cost of adoptions. and as rescues, not picking them up is for everyone’s care and concern :)
cute place, and even cuter kitties!! yay!
If I could rate higher, I would. 10/10 cats. Would pet again.
I love cats and coffee so this is the perfect spot! The cats are so sweet and loving, and the staff is super friendly! Absolutely will be stopping here on my next trip through!

Please take the negative reviews with a grain of salt, they read like a smear campaign. This facility is clean and welcoming, the owners and staff take great care of the animals and the cats look healthy and happy!
Beautiful little place, employees are quite nice. Except for one but she was fired thankfully.

We met and adopted Linus😻And we can’t wait to go back and chill with more kitty frands. Cool Beans is such an awesome cafe right in the heart of Gastonia. Great coffee great service and magical atmosphere!
Wonderful place!
This amazing gem is a must go! Super cute cafe,  caring owner and the best part,  cats!

A snug little spot. The drinks are delicious. I especially liked the chai tea.
Most of all, they have cats! Adoptable cats. It's a win/win for everyone. The cats get socialized for future adopters, and customers get to pet the kitties
This place is awesome! Don’t believe the two with anime profile pics, theyre just salty their garbo friend got fired for being such a 🅱️ Of a worker that just pushes 🅿️
Love it! Coffee and cats! Is there anything better than this?!? I think not🐾🖤🐾
Adorable selection of cats chill environment good coffee  would go again
Very lovely cafe! Owner was incredibly kind and you could clearly see how well she cares for the cats as they look so cute, snuggly and healthy! A must visit if you’re in the surrounding area!
This is the loveliest little cafe I could ever imagine, absolutely magical and you're never dining alone with all the fuzzy little friends around🖤🖤🖤
Great local spot - Really wonderful ownership, they’re passionate for downtown growth. Awesome concept - grab a quality coffee and have the opportunity to help some cuddle bugs with adoption😻

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi, I’m the other owner. I’m not passive aggressive at all. I will straight up say that it’s pretty obvious that these last few reviews are fake. reviews_data.review_text: wonderful cats, terrible business owners. I would recommend going anywhere else for a far better experience. juli and the other owner are very passive aggressive toward any negative feedback, so don't be surprised by the reviews reply. I will not be going back to this establishment.
Good tea, friendly staff, and of course adorable cats.

this cafe is lovely! i come all the time with friends and it is my favorite place. i love all the kitties ! they are all very friendly and love sitting in laps (even shoulders!) the place is very clean and the cats are well taken care of :)

What an amazing shop! The coffee is fantastic!! I love the atmosphere and the decor. Back where the cats are is so much fun. They are doing amazing things to find these babies homes. Everyone of them are happy, heathy and well adjusted floofs! This is a must try in downtown Gastonia!

Coffee for a cause! Not only is the place cool- but the help kitties find their forever homes while living in a non stressful environment- and getting socialization.from the public. And the coffee and baked items are phenomenal.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Heather!
reviews_data.review_text: Great coffee and so close to my house! I've gone to see the cats once (they are in a separated area which you pay a small fee to enter) but the other times I've gone just to get a latte which are delicious and service is so fast and friendly!

reviews_data.owner_answer: So glad you enjoyed it!
reviews_data.review_text:

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi, Chantel! 
All cat cafes charge a fee, it’s to pay for the up keep of our rescue cats! We are actually the cheapest cat cafe in the state. We were at max capacity in the lounge, which I expressed to you multiple times, and we definitely don’t allow younger people in the back without an adult present and you didn’t want to accompany your young people. If you don’t want to pay the fee that’s fine with us, but you can’t visit the cats without paying the fee. 
Your coffees may have tasted different because they were different. I asked multiple times if you wanted house brew coffee or a latte. Your son got house brew and you got a latte. Your son got caramel and vanilla in his drink, 2 flavors are sweeter than one, especially since you asked for light syrup instead of the normal amount in your latte. We apologize that you were let down, but we tried our best to help you understand our rules and how the coffee is made. Have a good day!

I went to order drinks, and asked questions about the sweetener used in the drinks. The answer was that they're all different. I told the person I was looking for cane sugar based and they're all different again was the response.

So, I ordered two iced coffees with oat milk and they were both drastically different. Neither tasted right
The maple one tasted like artifical chemicals and my son's caramel one was about 5 times as swwleet as mine and tasted like straight sugar.
